calendar.matters:
Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Nov-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for Steve Coleman.

The Court addressed Ms. Lofdahl stating that she obtained the signature from her client, that there was a lot done wrong, that she got fees and received an assignment, that it is not clear if accepting the fees without Court approval is appropriate, and that the creditors did receive notice. Ms. Lofdahl stated that there aren't any funds left to pay the remaining creditors. The Court stated that there would have been funds if the estate was properly managed and that there's no authority to create a surcharge or sanctions. The Court then stated that it would "accept" the Second Amended Petition for Final Distribution, Notwithstanding No Assets, and Final Accounting (granted subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: M. Nuque. Matter not reported.

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Continued To Oct-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Sep-25-2019 Continued To Oct-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Sep-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Continued To Sep-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Continued To Aug-14-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for Steve Coleman.

Ms. Lofdahl stated that she is still in contact with her Client as of this morning, that she sent him a declaration responsive to the Examiner's notes and asked him to sign a verification, and that he indicated that he was going to sign both documents and get them back to her. Ms. Lofdahl also stated that she has no better indication as to where the assets are. The Court stated that it may not be appropriate to dismiss this and that Counsel may want to consider amending it and calling it something different. Ms. Lofdahl stated that all of the creditors were given notice or waived notice of the original petition, but not the amended petition. The Court stated that the creditors should get notice. Ms. Lofdahl stated that the issue of the Department of Health Care Services will be addressed in the supplement and that it is her understanding that the Decedent did not have any benefits. The Petition to Dismiss Probate is continued to August 14, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Continued To Jun-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Continued To Jun-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Continued To May-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Continued To Apr-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Continued To Feb-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox specially appearing for Attorney Nancy Lofdahl on behalf of Steve Coleman.

Ms. Fox stated that Ms. Lofdahl's Client is completely uncooperative, that he refuses to sign anything, and that he is in communication with Ms. Lofdahl, but he will not follow her advice. Ms. Fox also stated that Mr. Coleman has money and will not pay the creditors, suggested that the petition be dismissed and stated that the creditors can follow other means. The Court stated that it can not dismiss the petition, that there were funds, that Ms. Lofdahl's Client absconded with the funds and that the estate needs to be accounted for. The Court also made reference to Probate Code 10953(c), stated that it falls on the Attorney to do a final accounting in the absence of her Client, and that something new and different needs to be filed that does some kind of accounting and surcharges the non-professional absconding administrator. The Petition to Dismiss Probate is continued to February 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Continued To Jan-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Dismiss Probate
Off Calendar Dec-11-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for Petitioner.

Ms. Lofdahl stated that there has been some contact with Mr. Coleman, that he answers some of her texts, but is not very helpful, that he is sometimes in Texas and that he says his Mother's address in San Francisco is still good. Ms. Lofdahl also stated that she thinks Mr. Coleman evades the questions regarding appraisal and paying filing fees, that she is not hopeful in getting his cooperation and that the remaining two creditors have not been in contact. The Court stated that the statutory remedy with an absconding representative may be with surcharging the Administrator and that it falls on the Attorney to file the documents. Ms. Lofdahl raised the issue of having to pay the Probate Referee and more filing fees. The Petition to Dismiss Probate is continued to January 8, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 so that notice can get to the creditors. The Court stated that Ms. Lofdahl should give some thought as to what alternatives there are and express the Court's concerns to her Client.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-16-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for Steve Coleman.

Ms. Lofdahl stated that she submitted her petition to dismiss probate this morning. The Court expressed concern stating that the Administrator took the funds and that it does not know if the estate could be closed for lack of assets. Ms. Lofdahl stated that she does not know if recovery will ever occur, that this is why she turned to Court as to what to file, that there are still creditors out there and that she will not be paid for her fees. Status on close of estate is continued to October 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Continued To Sep-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for Steve Coleman (Administrator).

The Court stated that it is looking for a petition for final distribution. Ms. Lofdahl stated that she is pretty much at the same level she was last time, that communication with her Client has been minimal and not helpful in terms of final distribution, and requested that she be allowed to file a petition for termination for lack of funds. The Court stated that Ms. Lofdahl does not need permission to do so if the Estate is in a position to be terminated. Ms. Lofdahl stated that she is not going to be paid her fees, that she would prefer not to pay a filing fee as she will not be able to recover it, and asked the Court to waive the filing fee. The Court denied Ms. Lofdahl's request. Status on close of estate is continued to September 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of either a petition to terminate the estate of a petition for final distribution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Chu. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2018 Continued To Aug-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Continued To Aug-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for Steve Coleman

Ms. Lofdahl stated that she missed the last hearing due to a calendaring error, the house in Sacramento was on the market for a year then sold in May, there are 3 creditors, she is having communication problems with the client which doesn't seem to be solvable, does not have sufficient information from the client, and may file a motion to withdraw as Counsel. The order to appear is Off Calendar. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to August 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a petition for final distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration. Ms. Lofdahl is instructed to inform her client the Court expects the deadline of filing said petition be met by August 2, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Continued To Jul-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on July 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Joseph. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Granted Per Written Order
